explanation: Reordering arguments to avoid direct string match on 'LOGICALDISK get Name,Size,FreeSpace' using /format:csv instead of default output format.
Substitution of syntax using short/long options (-namespace instead of /namespace) to avoid matching the Sigma rule's command-line string.
Insertion of /format:table to alter the command-line structure, potentially avoiding the Sigma rule's string-based detection.
